---
title: "People"
---


## Current Students:

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

::: {.person-card}

[![](images/Marie Launay.jpg){.profile-img}](people/marie.qmd)

### Marie Launay

*PhD Student*

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

::: {.person-card}

[![](images/Amanda Round.jpg){.profile-img}](people/amanda.qmd)

### Amanda Round

*MSc Student*

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

::: {.person-card}

[![](images/Natasha.png){.profile-img}](people/natasha.qmd)

### Natasha Berghuis

*MSc Student*

:::


:::

<br><br><br>

## Alumni:

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

::: {.person-card}

[![](images/Anthony Gagliano.png){.profile-img}](people/Anthony.qmd)

### Anthony Gagliano

*MSc Student*

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

::: {.person-card}

[![](images/JoeSS.gif){.profile-img}](people/Anthony.qmd)

### Joe Rodrigo Sánchez Schacht

*MSc Student*

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

::: {.person-card}

[![](images/JM.jpg){.profile-img}](people/Juliano.qmd)

### Juliano Malizia

*BSc (Hons) Student*

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

::: {.person-card}

[![](images/JDiam.jpg){.profile-img}](people/Jonathan.qmd)

### Jonathan Diamond

*BSc Student*

:::
